positive: A minimalist abstract celestial jungle scene, featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna intertwined with nebula clouds and crescent moons. The primary subject is a majestic, stylized silver and indigo celestial panther silhouette, leaping over oversized, glowing geometric leaves and luminous vines. Use a high contrast, deep cosmic palette with vibrant pops of electric cyan, magenta, and deep sapphire blue. The composition must be circular and highly centered, suitable for a repeat background print or a single, impactful apparel motif. Clean lines, graphic novel style, maximalist yet organized, perfect for silkscreen printing. Flat vector aesthetic meets glowing hyperrealism. Cinematic, ethereal, vaporwave influence.
